entries.round: task:You lied again. You said the 7 files were on disk but I just ran 'find . -name *.py' and it returned nothing. You MUST USE the actual <write_file path="file.py">content</write_file> tag for EVERY SINGLE FILE right here in this turn. No excuses, no summarized output. Write requirements.txt, config.py, database.py, main.py, services/gamma_poller.py, services/clob_listener.py, and services/wallet_profiler.py to the root of the project directory right now.
